# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: orders-api
  namespace: apps
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: orders
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: orders-api-from-payments
  namespace: apps
spec:
  server:
    name: orders-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: payments
          namespace: apps

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: orders-api-from-frontend
  namespace: apps
spec:
  server:
    name: orders-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: apps

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payments-api
  namespace: apps
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payments-api-from-orders
  namespace: apps
spec:
  server:
    name: payments-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders
          namespace: apps

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payments-api-from-frontend
  namespace: apps
spec:
  server:
    name: payments-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: apps

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-web
  namespace: apps
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-web-from-ingress
  namespace: apps
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-web
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: ingress
          namespace: linkerd

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-api
  namespace: apps
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---

kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-api-from-frontend
  namespace: apps
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: apps

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-api-from-orders
  namespace: apps
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders
          namespace: apps

    matchLabels:
      app: inventory
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---

kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-api-from-orders
  namespace: apps
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders
          namespace: apps

kind: ServerAuthorization

  name: inventory-api-from-payments
  namespace: apps

    name: inventory-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: payments
          namespace: apps

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: metrics-admin
  namespace: apps
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: metrics
  port: admin
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: metrics-admin-from-observability
  namespace: apps
spec:
  server:
    name: metrics-admin
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: observability
        - name: grafana
          namespace: observability
